title: Generational Capital Markets Advises B & B Airparts in Its Sale to Spartan Aerospace Group, a Portfolio Company of The Edgewater Funds
summary: DALLAS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Generational Capital Markets (GCM), a member of FINRA/SIPC and a leading mergers and acquisitions consultant for privately held businesses, is pleased to announce the sale of B & B Airparts to Spartan Aerospace Group, a portfolio company of The Edgewater Funds. The acquisition closed January 5, 2026.
